content: any suggestions for a new team?

I'm going to ask for help too - I'm sure y'all get this a hundred times a day. Cheri's guide is great and the Flares guides are good, but I feel like I'm struggling to find damage as I'm missing a primary DPS still. I pulled tawil, but without relics for her she's just diddling mostly while I try to counter/shield. If I don't run Sanga I can't really sustain fights either.

Any suggestions on where to invest to finish arc1 ch5+ while I work on account level and pulling together actual teams? 

Here's what I've been trying in train to get an idea of comp:
Tawil+Cae+Naut core (Missing some survivability in dupes is really hurting)
+
Sanga (Survived fine.. for 700 turns)
Ramona (Plenty of energy to ult spam.. and do nothing with it all)

I haven't tried tawil+cae+naut+24 - I was using her with cae, goliath, tulu to speedrun 1shot story up till now.. Maybe it would work?
Is celestial beast best in slot for Gelot after sword is +12?
for non limited wheels, yes
Whats the limited one?
sig
Should I use a Prototype Horizon here and if so on who?
Have you considered pulling arachne
Also flares guides have estimated 60% good info and 40% misinfo. Would not reccomend
E.g. clem, pollux, Mouchette are good
Arachne can be paired well witj caecus celeste +1
I rather play thais lotan than tawil main dps
Finally manged to beat the phase 4 boss in rail with this team, still need a lot of train upgrades
probably not the best team makeup but a fun build

Yea I'm learning it's not perfect info. 

No i haven't considered since i was following the guide I've been dumping on moon
Oh, get arachne as your top priority. Moonless is good for new players but arachne is a very good boost to your acc
Id run her what tawil, Winkle, alva?
Alva might not work well there, the rest is fine
But arachne is a very complicated unit to play
For the early game, you can just focus on using her 1 cost to clear mobs

Hi guys, I’m new to the game and have been playing for about 3–4 days. I’ve tried to build my teams by reading the skills as best as I could, and because I don’t want to waste my silver/cores, I wanted to ask if there’s anyone in my current teams or character pool that you would change or prioritize that I don’t already have.
Also, if you have any advice regarding WoD/weapons, I’d really appreciate it. 😃
jus try stuff out for levels, lv 60 is cheap and easy to get after 1-2 months of playing dont worry too much abt mats
for pulls, arachne dupes until e3 are good
but if u dont plan to rush story for pulls u can just save
Okay, I’m gonna grind. I really like her—she’s so fun to play with. If I don’t hit E3, how long do I have to wait for her to come back?
A long time
btw thank you for answer
Dont count on the rerun
Might be a year from now
jzz
thanks for warning 😮
That doesn’t mean you should dump your pulls for arachne though
can someone please help me form five teams to upgrade and build for the next d zone?
ive tried looking up team building guides but most of them include new characters and i just started playing a few weeks ago <:Caecus_alone:1486654030003437598>
Strange enough I also got the same request. I tried to do GHelot, Vortice, Kath, Arachne, one for each wave. But can't seem to break thru w2d3.
use a whale support for w2
Already used it for W5
w2 is hardest this dtide
arachne can solo w3 since it's ultra ring
I see, Ok guess it is reset time for all my guys.

Ghelot and Wanda/arachne are the only two meta teams you can build. Borrow a mouch for another team. You could make poison teams with Liz and or Nymph but they won't be good without a lot of investment
Otherwise just throw together some scuffed team temporarily around jenkin and sorel
awww what a shame
thank you for the advice!
Lol Arachne really soloed W3
Are you talking about W3 Alert 5?
How much should i build arachne out for that?
a4, a5 I kinda got trampled.
But my team was Arachne, Cass. and two randos
I see. I haven’t really done dtide yet and ive been playing around 4 months now maybe more
So i know I’ve been missing out on resources
But it’s a bit overwhelming and time consuming to make 5 different teams
And im stuck af lol
Absolutely not optimal
use erica posse
incredibly unserious unit
need good sf and exalt lv
lv60 is ok
the better your supports are the less u need for sf and exalt lv
What’s sf?
if u bring 3 bums u prolly want sf10 and exalt lv6 for comfy clear
soulforge
Who should i upgrade for dtide<:VertinHmm:1346449883997016167>
Caecus Wanda Tinct
Can skimp on Tinct levels some for now though since shes mostly used for crit buffs
<a:VoyaNod:1388081248735330306> thank you
Wanda is kind of situational but she can carry if you bring her to the right stage
Shes very good into current wave 4
Suits me
Any crumbs is good<:SpathodeaWisdom:1177162591408230470>

Could i get some assistance with teams?

Currently im planning 

Mouch Aigis Helot Thais

Castor Horla Jenkins + someone else idk

Miriam Celeste Tulu  + assisting GMurphy

An arachne team if i can think of one

And idk
For dtide* and not necessarily in that order
Should i keep using salvador thais aigis horla or should i start investing in other characters?
Got a bunch of upgrading material but dont want to invest more in salvador if other characters diff him later in story
Well up to lvl 60 is relatively low investment
So don’t worry about that
If you can level up your arachne and her skills, using ephemeral eternity and dreams of medicine covenant she can solo w3
alert 5
I can do that. Ive got plenty of resources stacked up
For lemurian team would recommend you go Miriam, tulu, goliath, assist gmurphy. Goliath exalt buff is a big part of that teams damage.
how leveled is your vortice skills
shell card is leveled
and have sf
she should be a carry for a wave
And her soulforge is 10:10

your main team is up to you.

But if you love Salvador - you should start Salv /Arachne / Thais + 1 more
dump her with celeste murphy and caecus or something
do w 4
Do i level them?
every char should lvl 60
every one
Ah okay
u can go full lemurian for your borrow gmurphy i guess with goli tulu and miryam
Which wave should the borrow go to? 5?
And do i need to put SF points on everyone? And uh whats a good low investment stopping point for the soulforge
For arachne how much SF should i put?
as much as possible otherwise she doesnt do enough damage. lvl 5 is the minimum bar in my mind
for every unit lol
lvl 5 is the cheap baseline, lvl 8 is the next milestone
lvl 10 is expensive af
Ohkay damn lvl 5 seems like a lot but yeah its about time i start clearing dtide
Cause ive been postponing doing this
Who do i put with her? Or it doesn’t matter at all?
Just do a1 at least, any level 60s can do it
doesnt matter but weakness/draw/shield support is nice
Guys new to the game! What should I invest into which will transition okay into late game stuff
crypto
+guides
